case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. JULIUS LEE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
